name: Vectorize MCP Server
what_it_does: Vectorize MCP server enabling AI agents to use Vectorize.io's managed RAG platform — ingesting documents, performing semantic vector search, retrieving relevant context, and integrating Vectorize's managed embedding and retrieval infrastructure into agent-driven knowledge retrieval and RAG workflows.
use_cases: Semantic document search over indexed content from research agents
RAG retrieval for context-augmented generation from knowledge agents
Building document Q&A systems from customer support agents
Indexing and searching company knowledge bases from productivity agents
Retrieving relevant code examples from developer assistant agents
not_for: On-premise vector search requirements (managed cloud service)
Simple keyword search — vector search adds complexity and cost
best_when: An agent needs managed, production-quality semantic vector search and document retrieval without building infrastructure — Vectorize handles embedding, indexing, and retrieval.
avoid_when: You prefer self-hosted vector search (Chroma, Weaviate) or have an existing RAG stack — use those direct MCPs instead.

auth.notes: Vectorize.io API key required. Available from Vectorize dashboard. Pipeline ID required for specific retrieval pipelines.

pricing.paid_tiers: Vectorize.io: usage-based pricing for production workloads
pricing.notes: Official MCP from Vectorize.io. Free tier available for development. Production usage has pricing.

known_agent_gotchas: Pipeline ID required for retrieval — create pipelines in Vectorize dashboard first
Document ingestion takes time — freshly ingested content may not be immediately searchable
Vectorize is a managed service — data is stored on Vectorize servers
Search quality depends on embedding model choice and pipeline configuration
Official Vectorize MCP — higher quality than community vector search MCPs
Retrieval results are probabilistic — relevance scores indicate similarity, not certainty
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Vectorize API key. Documents stored on Vectorize cloud. Official MCP. Consider data privacy for indexed documents. Secure API key storage.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key. Documents on Vectorize cloud. Official MCP. Privacy for indexed content.
